mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, level, publish_mode, scheduled_at, popup_enabled, valid_from, valid_to, target_type, status, published_at, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, deleted_category, deleted_at, deleted_by FROM jq_sys_notice WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, title, content, level, publish_mode, scheduled_at, popup_enabled, valid_from, valid_to, target_type, status, published_at, remark, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, deleted_category, deleted_at, deleted_by FROM jq_sys_notice WHERE publish_mode = 'SCHEDULED' AND status = 'PENDING' AND is_deleted = 0 AND scheduled_at IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_at <= #{now} ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC, id ASC
